Appearances:
Plaintiff 845 California Street, LLC. is present.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jason Sanders is present.
Attorney Joseph J. Catalano representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
